message:
fix(keybindings,tools): refine keybinding dispatch and tool argument handling

- src/keybindings.rs: minor fix (+2/-1)
- src/interactive/keybindings.rs: refine interactive keybinding dispatch
- src/interactive/tests.rs: update test expectations
- src/tools.rs: extend tool argument handling (+13/-4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1100,7 +1100,7 @@ mod tests {
                 Vec::new(),
                 event_tx,
                 runtime_handle(),
-                true,
+                false,
                 None,
                 Some(KeyBindings::new()),
                 Vec::new(),
